comment.body:
@Alma few clarifying q’s from post this am - Constant local skew selling and lower local spot/vol beta needed for this.- does this mean local downside skew selling ( gamma supply below) or upside skew selling ( gamma supply above) 
2. Can you elaborate a bit about vanna flip ? If I’m understanding it correctly if spot fails to break through vanna flip then we have high proctor drifting lower towards Dow side pivot target of 6803 .
comment.raw_body:
${1} few clarifying q’s from post this am - Constant local skew selling and lower local spot/vol beta needed for this.- does this mean local downside skew selling ( gamma supply below) or upside skew selling ( gamma supply above) 
2. Can you elaborate a bit about vanna flip ? If I’m understanding it correctly if spot fails to break through vanna flip then we have high proctor drifting lower towards Dow side pivot target of 6803 .
